spec_match.rationale: The page now uses position-try-fallbacks for the named fallback and position-try-order: most-height for ordering.

interactive.rationale: The toggle switches fallback ordering and the scroll button moves the anchored item into view.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page now exercises the remembered-scroll-offset anchor behaviour with current syntax.

edge_cases.rationale: The direct support probe checks position-try-order and position-area rather than a broad proxy.

references.rationale: The wrong ChromeStatus ID was replaced with chromestatus.com/feature/4710507824807936.

design_system.rationale: The page remains within the shared CSS variable palette.

summary: The recovery lab now uses the current syntax and correct references.
